holdings.infoBox: NDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Atlas Energy Solutions stock at 7.22%, FLEX LNG at 5.20%, Eastman Chemical Company at 4.92%, Sylvamo at 4.90%, and Barrick Mining at 4.47%.

overview.description: The Amplify Energy & Natural Resources Covered Call ETF (NDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a covered call strategy applied to dividend-paying US energy and natural resources equities. The fund seeks to provide equity income and partial participation in sector gains through monthly option premiums NDIV was launched on Aug 24, 2022 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: VettaFi Energy and Natural Resources Covered Call Index

data.text: Fears of hotter-than-expected inflation were realized today. Consumer Price Index (CPI) data revealed that headline CPI rose 0.6% month-over-month in April.
